title: pouzolzia zeylanica var. alienata
intro: Pouzolzia zeylanica var. alienata, also known as the creeping nettle or alienate Pouzolzia, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Urticaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pouzolzia zeylanica var. alienata include reducing pain and inflammation, treating skin irritations and allergies, and acting as an antacid to soothe digestive issues. Pouzolzia zeylanica var. alienata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
